results.title: Demons' loss not on Langford's shoulders: King
results.description: Harvey Langford missed the chance to kick a match-winning goal, but Melbourne coach Steven King put his side's loss to the Bulldogs down to other factors.

results.title: Sachin Tendulkar shares heartfelt note for son Arjun after his first IPL 2026 appearance for LSG
results.description: Legendary former batter Sachin Tendulkar wrote a heartfelt note for his son Arjun Tendulkar who featured in the 2026 Indian Premier League for the first time yesterday during Lucknow Super Giants' 7-wicket defeat against the Punjab Kings at the Ekana Stadium

results.title: Ghana’s Isaac Obeng clinches bronze at Oran World Para Powerlifting 2026
results.description: Ghana continues to rise through para sports excellence on the global stage.

results.title: Kaizer Chiefs to decide the fate of the two coaches next week
results.description: Kaizer Chiefs co-coach Cedric Kaze hopes the performance in the second half of the season could convince the board to keep them.

results.title: Video Shows James Harden Playing Zero Defense In Miserable Game 3 Loss
results.description: James Harden is getting crushed online after multiple viral clips from the Cleveland Cavaliers’ brutal Game 3 loss to the New York Knicks appeared to show him giving almost no defensive effort during key stretches of the game.
